HEARTHCRAFT
⌂ Home ◷ Time ⛏ Build ☺ People ▣ Shots ✦ End ? Info ! Meme

Where is HC?

HearthCraft shut down in April 2025. This site is what remains.

After years as a home for countless players, the decision was made to close the server. Technical debt from an aging setup — world files approaching a terabyte — combined with the owner's transition to college life and hard-to-reverse errors in the 1.21 update.

On April 18, 2025, the last day the server could stay online, players gathered to say goodbye one last time.

View the last day →

HEARTHCRAFT SMP · 2018 – 2025

One world. Never reset.
